steps.title: Identify the narrator's claim
steps.content: The narrator says there is a chance she will make the basketball team. The rest of the passage explains why: she is small, quick, wiry, tough, and able to dodge under other players to grab the ball.

steps.title: Match the purpose
steps.content: Choice A invents a comparison with other sports. Choice B turns the passage into general instructions for basketball, and choice C invents a selection process. The passage explains why the narrator thinks she might make the team. The answer is D.
